mission.title: Install and Configure Wasmedge Runtime on Kubernetes
mission.description: WasmEdge is a lightweight, high-performance WebAssembly runtime designed for cloud-native, edge, and decentralized applications. Installing WasmEdge allows you to run serverless apps, microservices, and smart contracts efficiently on various devices.

steps.title: Install WasmEdge runtime
steps.description:
Install WasmEdge using the official install script:
```bash
curl -sSf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WasmEdge/WasmEdge/master/utils/install.sh | bash
source $HOME/.wasmedge/env
```
See https://wasmedge.org/docs/start/install for other platforms.

steps.title: Run a WebAssembly program
steps.description:
Test WasmEdge with a simple WASM program:
```bash
wasmedge --version

# Run a WASM file
curl -Lo hello.wasm https://github.com/nicholasgasior/gowasm/raw/master/examples/hello/hello.wasm
wasmedge hello.wasm
```

steps.title: Run an LLM with LlamaEdge (optional)
steps.description:
WasmEdge powers LlamaEdge for running LLMs locally:
```bash
# See https://llamaedge.com/docs/intro for full setup
wasmedge --dir .:. --nn-preload default:GGML:AUTO:model.gguf llama-api-server.wasm
```

troubleshooting.title: wasmedge command not found
troubleshooting.description:
Source the environment file:
```bash
source $HOME/.wasmedge/env
```
Or add to your shell profile.

troubleshooting.title: WASM module fails to load
troubleshooting.description:
Ensure the WASM file targets wasm32-wasi. Check with:
```bash
file your-program.wasm
```

troubleshooting.title: GPU not detected for LLM inference
troubleshooting.description:
Install the CUDA/Vulkan plugin:
```bash
curl -sSf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WasmEdge/WasmEdge/master/utils/install.sh | bash -s -- --plugins wasmedge_rustls wasi_nn-ggml-cuda
```

resolution.summary: WasmEdge runtime is installed and can execute WebAssembly programs including LLM inference.

prerequisites.description: No Kubernetes cluster required. WasmEdge runs on Linux, macOS, and Windows.
